name: Jimmy Rowser
abstract: James Edward Rowser (April 18, 1926 in Philadelphia – June 24, 2004 in Teaneck) was an American jazz double-bassist.

concerts.label: Jack Humphrey Septet/ Maynard Ferguson and His Orchestra/ Sarah Vaughan/ Modern Jazz Quartet
Midnight Performance: Jack Humphrey Septet/ Maynard Ferguson and His Orchestra/ Sarah Vaughan/ Modern Jazz Quartet

about_quotes.speaker: Ray Bryant
about_quotes.evidence: most of the time Jimmy Rowser was the bass player. My brother Tommy played bass too... So Jimmy Rowser was, most of the time, a part of the trio.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ray Bryant interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, March 22, 1998

about_quotes.speaker: Pierre Boussaguet
about_quotes.evidence: Please welcome Mr. Jimmy Rowser... I see this big guy with... he had red leather shoes.
about_quotes.doc_title: Pierre Boussaguet interviewed by Matthieu Jaffre, Aix en Provence, France, July 28, 2020
